sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49269" key="qugatri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠγατρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n49269.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">call one daughter</tr_>, Araros <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0016.tlg001.perseus-grc1:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
